description_long: This is a rustic wooden bucket with a cylindrical body constructed from vertical wooden staves, each showing distinct wood grain and texture. The bucket is reinforced by three thick, black metal bands encircling its exterior, providing both structural support and a rugged aesthetic. Two robust, curved metal handles are attached on opposite sides, with one handle featuring a wooden grip for comfortable carrying. The top rim is uneven, mimicking the look of hand-crafted woodwork, and the interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids or materials. The base is also reinforced with a metal band adorned with rounded rivets, enhancing durability. The overall design suggests it is built for heavy-duty use in outdoor or urban environments.
description: A rugged wooden bucket reinforced with black metal bands and two sturdy side handles, one with a wooden grip. The bucket features a hand-crafted look with visible wood grain and a reinforced base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden grip on the handle and the uneven wooden rim, with all three metal bands and riveted base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metal handle attachment and the continuous wood grain, with the wooden grip partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted wooden surface and all three metal bands, with no handle grip visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the metal handle attachment and the wooden grip from a different angle, emphasizing the bucket's cylindrical shape.
attribute_handle_type: metal bail handles with wooden grip
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops at top, middle, and base
